canonical_answer: At 0s, a person handles a brown object on a red cutting board; at 8s, hands operate a metal garlic press above a black pot; at 10s, a person uses a manual can opener on a metal can; at 14s, hands actively turn the can opener handle; at 18s, the can opener continues cutting the metal can near spice jars.

question: What objects are placed on or near the red cutting board during the different steps?
canonical_answer: At 0s, a potato sits on a red cutting board in front of white cabinets; at 6s, a dark pot rests on a stove burner nearby; at 8s, minced garlic appears on a press over a black pot; at 10s, a metal can is positioned on the red cutting board; at 16s, a container of cashews sits behind the cutting board.
